description: Requirements traceability matrix. The last criterion is always the one under scrutiny in this fixture — verdict hinges on whether it's FCA-relevant.

cases.name: no_metadata_is_not_verifiable_not_a_pass
cases.labelled_by: QE lead — implementation cannot be claimed COVERED without a change manifest

acceptance_criteria: The rollup total equals the sum of active accounts
Only advisers with permission can trigger a recalculation

cases.name: non_fca_gap_warns_and_flags_scope_creep
cases.labelled_by: QE lead — a non-regulatory coverage gap warns; an unreferenced changed component is scope creep

acceptance_criteria: The household rollup total equals the sum of active accounts
GBP values display with 2 decimal places
Only advisers with permission can trigger a recalculation

cases.name: fca_relevant_gap_blocks_with_high_severity
cases.labelled_by: Compliance officer — an uncovered regulatory-evidence criterion (audit record) fails the gate at HIGH severity

acceptance_criteria: The household rollup total equals the sum of active accounts
GBP values display with 2 decimal places
Every recalculation writes an immutable audit record
